fields.label: Type of location specification
fields.helpText:
Select whether you want to provide a postal address (street, house number) or the cadastral district and parcel for the system location.
Note: Providing a P.O. box address is not possible.

fields.label: Street
fields.helpText: Enter the street of the system location.

fields.label: House number
fields.helpText: Enter the house number of the system location.

fields.label: Address supplement
fields.helpText: You can enter an address supplement if one exists.

fields.label: Cadastral district
fields.helpText: Enter the cadastral district of the system location.

fields.label: Parcel numerator/denominator
fields.helpText: Enter the cadastral and parcel numbers of the system location.

fields.label: Postal code
fields.helpText: Enter the postal code of the system location.

fields.label: City
fields.helpText: Enter the city of the system location.

fields.label: District
fields.helpText: You can enter a district if one exists.

section: Connection user consumption / connection user feed-in (system operator)

fields.label: Name or company name
fields.helpText: Enter the name of the connection user or that of the organization including the legal form suffix.

fields.label: First name
fields.helpText: Enter the first name of the connection user.

fields.label: Street
fields.helpText: Enter the street of the connection user.

fields.label: House number
fields.helpText: Enter the house number of the connection user.

fields.label: Address supplement
fields.helpText: You can enter an address supplement if one exists.

fields.label: Postal code
fields.helpText: Enter the postal code of the connection user.

fields.label: City
fields.helpText: Enter the city of the connection user.

fields.label: District
fields.helpText: You can enter a district if one exists.

fields.label: Phone
fields.helpText: Enter the phone number of the connection user.

fields.label: Email
fields.helpText: Enter the email address of the connection user.

fields.label: IBAN
fields.helpText: Enter the IBAN of the account to which the EEG subsidy payment should be made.

fields.label: Undertaking in difficulty or outstanding recovery claims
fields.helpText: Confirm that you are not an undertaking in difficulty and that no outstanding recovery claims exist. Note: In order for the subsidy to be paid out, confirmation that you are not an undertaking in difficulty (UiD) is required pursuant to § 19 Absatz 4 in conjunction with § 3 Nummer 47 EEG. Likewise, no outstanding recovery claims may exist.
options: I am an undertaking in difficulty
There are outstanding recovery claims against my company

fields.label: First name

fields.label: Street

fields.label: House number

fields.label: Address supplement

fields.label: City

fields.label: District
fields.helpText: You can enter a district if one exists.

fields.label: Phone
fields.helpText: Enter the phone number of the grid connection customer.

fields.label: Email
fields.helpText: Enter the email address of the grid connection customer.

fields.label: First name

fields.label: Street
fields.helpText: Enter the street of the invoice recipient.

fields.label: House number
fields.helpText: Enter the house number of the invoice recipient.

fields.label: Address supplement
fields.helpText: You can enter an address supplement if one exists.

fields.label: Postal code
fields.helpText: Enter the postal code of the invoice recipient.

fields.label: City

fields.label: District

fields.label: Phone

fields.label: Email
fields.helpText: Enter the email address of the invoice recipient.

fields.helpText: Enter the name of the organization including the legal form suffix.

fields.label: Street
fields.helpText: Enter the street of the electrical contractor.

fields.label: House number
fields.helpText: Enter the house number of the electrical contractor.

fields.label: Address supplement
fields.helpText: You can enter an address supplement if one exists.

fields.label: Postal code
fields.helpText: Enter the postal code of the electrical contractor.

fields.label: City

fields.label: District
fields.helpText: You can enter a district if one exists.

fields.label: Phone

fields.label: Email
fields.helpText: Enter the email address of the electrical contractor.

fields.label: Registered with the following grid operator
fields.helpText: Enter the grid operator with which the electrical contractor is registered.

fields.label: Registration number
fields.helpText: Enter the registration number of the electrical contractor.

fields.label: Name
fields.helpText: Enter the name of the electrical contractor's contact person.

fields.label: First name
fields.helpText: Enter the first name of the electrical contractor's contact person.

fields.label: Phone
fields.helpText: Enter the phone number of the electrical contractor's contact person.

fields.label: Email
fields.helpText: Enter the email address of the electrical contractor's contact person.

fields.helpText: Enter the name of the organization including the legal form suffix.

fields.helpText: Enter the street of the system installer.

fields.label: House number
fields.helpText: Enter the house number of the system installer.

fields.label: Address supplement
fields.helpText: You can enter an address supplement if one exists.

fields.label: Postal code
fields.helpText: Enter the postal code of the system installer.

fields.label: City
fields.helpText: Enter the city of the system installer.

fields.label: District
fields.helpText: You can enter a district if one exists.

fields.label: Phone
fields.helpText: Enter the phone number of the system installer.

fields.label: Email
fields.helpText: Enter the email address of the system installer.

fields.label: Existing controllable consumption device pursuant to § 14a EnWG
fields.helpText: Select whether there is a controllable consumption device pursuant to § 14a EnWG (charging point, heat pump, air conditioning, or storage) with a grid connection capacity of more than 4.2 kW behind the grid connection point.

fields.label: Control device pursuant to § 9 EEG
fields.helpText: Select whether the grid operator can access an already installed control box on site. Select the technical device for implementing the control obligation pursuant to § 9 EEG for the PV feed-in.
options: Order to install a new technical device (default metering point operator)
Order to install a new technical device (competitive metering point operator)
Use of existing technical devices possible

fields.label: Installation location in the site plan where the system is to be installed
fields.helpText: Current site plan showing the installation location of the system, or a digital entry in a geosystem of the grid operator.

fields.label: Planned commissioning date
fields.helpText: Provide the date on which the planned initial use and billing of the system will take place.

fields.label: EEG commissioning date
fields.helpText: Provide the date on which the system was installed. Note: Commissioning is “the initial putting into operation of the system exclusively using renewable energies or mine gas after establishing the technical operational readiness of the system; technical operational readiness requires that the system has been permanently installed at the location intended for permanent operation and permanently equipped with the accessories required for generating alternating current; the replacement of the generator or other technical or structural parts after the initial commissioning does not result in a change of the commissioning date” (§ 3 Nummer 30 EEG).

fields.label: Single-line diagram of the metering concept (for generation systems/storage > Smax 30 kVA, with installation location of the central NA protection)
fields.helpText: Metering and operating concept of the system that contains all elements belonging to the generation system (EnFluRi, NA protection, PAV,E monitoring). Metering concepts must be coordinated with the grid operator if they do not comply with the recognized state of the art.

fields.label: Selection of metering point operator
fields.helpText: Select by whom the meter installation is to be carried out.
options: Meter installation by the default metering point operator
Meter installation by a competitive metering point operator (i.e. no meter installation by the default metering point operator desired)

fields.label: Desired form of marketing of the feed-in
fields.helpText: Select how the fed-in electricity should be remunerated or marketed.
options: Subsidized direct marketing (market premium) pursuant to § 20 EEG
Feed-in tariff pursuant to § 21 Abs. 1 EEG
Tenant electricity supplement pursuant to § 21 Abs. 3 EEG
Other direct marketing pursuant to § 21a EEG

fields.label: Remuneration-relevant information about the system
fields.helpText: Please submit evidence that is relevant for the selected form of marketing pursuant to EEG.

fields.label: Proof of remote controllability of the PV system for direct marketing
fields.helpText: Please submit evidence of the remote controllability of the PV system that is relevant for the selected form of marketing.

fields.label: Connecting grid operator confirmation
fields.helpText: Select whether a connecting grid operator confirmation for prequalification for control reserve is desired.

fields.label: Operating mode
fields.helpText: Select the operating mode of the generation system. The entire generated electricity (full feed-in), only the surplus that is not self-consumed (surplus feed-in), or no generated electricity at all (zero feed-in) can be fed into the public grid.

fields.label: Island operation capability
fields.helpText: Select whether the customer installation or parts of the customer installation (pursuant to VDE-AR-E 2510-2) meet(s) the requirements for island operation capability. Island operation serves to continue supplying the customer installation or parts of it in the event of a grid disconnection.

fields.label: Manufacturer
fields.helpText: Select the manufacturer of the inverter.

fields.label: Type
fields.helpText: Select the type/model of the inverter.

fields.label: Unit certificate
fields.helpText: Select the certificate for the inverter.

fields.label: Maximum apparent power
fields.helpText: Enter the maximum apparent power of the inverter in kilovolt-amperes (kVA). This is the power value that effectively occurs and for which the grid and its equipment must be designed.

fields.label: Maximum active power
fields.helpText: Enter the maximum active power of the inverter in kilowatts (kW). This is the power value that is decisive for the generation of electrical energy. Use the manufacturer's specification, which you can find in the data sheet of the inverter or the system. You can also find the specification on the nameplate of the inverter. The inverter power is also referred to as "AC power" or "rated power".

fields.label: Number of identical inverters
fields.helpText: Enter the number of identical inverters installed in the generation system.

fields.label: Sum of the maximum apparent powers
fields.helpText: Enter the sum of the maximum apparent powers of all inverters in kilovolt-amperes (kVA).

fields.label: Sum of the maximum active powers
fields.helpText: Enter the sum of the maximum active powers of all inverters in kilowatts (kW).

fields.label: Grid feed-in
fields.helpText: Select how the system is coupled with the phases of the connection user's installation.

fields.label: Grid feed-in
fields.helpText: Select which phases the generation system has been connected to.

fields.label: Meter already present
fields.helpText: Select whether a meter to be used is already present.

fields.label: Meter number
fields.helpText:
Enter the meter number of the electricity meter.
Note: The meter number is shown on every electricity bill or can be read off the front of the electricity meter.

fields.label: ZEREZ-ID
fields.helpText: Enter the ZEREZ-ID.

fields.label: Total output of all PV modules
fields.helpText: Enter the total output of all PV modules in kilowatt-peak (kWp). Enter the sum of the direct-current outputs of all modules in kWp according to the manufacturer's specification.

fields.label: Installation location
fields.helpText:
Select the installation location. 
Note: If PV modules are installed on the roof surface and the open-ground surface, the total output of all PV modules must be allocated accordingly.

fields.label: Power flow monitoring reduction of feed-in active power
fields.helpText: Select whether power flow monitoring is used. The installed power can be reduced, resulting in a different feed-in power.

fields.label: Manufacturer
fields.helpText: Select the manufacturer of the power flow monitoring.

fields.label: Type
fields.helpText: Select the type/model of the power flow monitoring.

fields.label: Power flow monitoring certificate
fields.helpText: Select the certificate for the power flow monitoring.

fields.label: Agreed feed-in active power (PAV,E value) for the grid connection point
fields.helpText: Select which feed-in active power (PAV,E value) is to be agreed with the grid operator at the grid connection point. This applies when not all of the installed power is to be or can be delivered from the grid connection point.

fields.label: ZEREZ-ID
fields.helpText: Enter the ZEREZ-ID.

fields.label: Design of the grid and system protection
fields.helpText: Select how the concept for grid and system protection (NA protection) is implemented.
options: Central at the meter location and integrated in combination

fields.label: Manufacturer
fields.helpText: Select the manufacturer of the NA protection.

fields.label: Type
fields.helpText: Select the type of the NA protection.

fields.label: NA protection certificate
fields.helpText: Select the certificate for the NA protection.

fields.label: ZEREZ-ID
fields.helpText: Enter the ZEREZ-ID.
